top_signals.title: Dark Oil Tanker Transits Keep Oil Flowing Through Hormuz Ahead of Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Tankers crossing the Strait of Hormuz with signals turned off are keeping this month’s oil flows at more robust levels than earlier in the Middle East conflict, as shippers await the signing of a US-Iran peace deal this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Aviation Debt Boom Rolls On as Mideast Tensions Ease Further
top_signals.summary: Athens International Airport SA and TAP Air Portugal are adding to a record start to the year for borrowing by the aviation sector globally, as the industry looks to navigate the impact of the Middle East war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Middle East peace deal could herald oil glut next year, says IEA
top_signals.summary: ‘Gradual’ return of flows will give way to sharp rise in production, outstripping forecasts for increased demand
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK Inflation Unexpectedly Holds Steady Ahead of BOE Decision - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: UK Inflation Unexpectedly Holds Steady Ahead of BOE Decision  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Copper Miner Antofagasta Seeks to Link Ore Sales to Spot Market
top_signals.summary: Chile’s Antofagasta Plc has approached Chinese copper smelters with a proposal to price contractual sales of copper ore using spot-market indexes, a fresh sign that a decades-old system based on fixed-price deals is under strain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Citadel Securities Saw ‘Astronomical’ Retail Flows on Friday
top_signals.summary: Retail investors poured into US stocks at a record pace on the day of SpaceX’s blockbuster initial public offering and are increasingly driving the broader rally in equities, according to Citadel Securities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Buying Cursor could be SpaceX’s Instagram moment
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk can learn from Mark Zuckerberg by refraining from too much meddling
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Warner warns of CISA cuts, staffing gaps in letter to acting chief
top_signals.summary: Warner on Tuesday also wrote a letter to DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin, underscoring that DHS must prioritize CISA and pay for the MS-ISAC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump delays confirmation hearing of former SEC head Jay Clayton as US intelligence chief
top_signals.summary: President blames Democrats for blocking intelligence legislation over appointment of Bill Pulte in acting role
